plugin.name: Workflow Visualizer
plugin.description: IDE-native preview and analysis for Serverless Workflow (.sw.json): live PlantUML diagram, navigation, inspections, and semantic highlighting.
plugin.change-notes:
0.3.0
  • Added: trackpad pinch-to-zoom on the diagram (macOS).
  • Added: Zoom In / Zoom Out toolbar buttons (Ctrl+= / Ctrl+-).
  • Added: a one-time hint pointing out the diagram's navigation gestures.
  • Changed: scrolling now pans the diagram (two-finger swipe or mouse wheel); zoom moved to Cmd/Ctrl+scroll or a trackpad pinch.
